code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  let delim = string.from_byte(10)
  mut seen = delim
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          let key = "#{delim}#{cur}#{delim}"
          if not string.contains(seen, key)
            seen = "#{seen}#{cur}#{delim}"
            count = count + 1
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let key = "#{delim}#{cur}#{delim}"
    if not string.contains(seen, key)
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("unique=#{count}")
end
